title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Hindustan Unilever

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Hindustan Unilever
jsonLd.description:
Hindustan Unilever has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hindustan Unilever:
Hindustan Unilever is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Unilever!
